narrative:
Harrod (precinct in Allen County) has 239 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
